title: NotebookFlow
description: NotebookFlow canvas settings: bring-your-own-key LLM credentials and the engine connection.

llmProvider.title: LLM provider
llmProvider.description: LLM provider used for the AI features (Ask / Compose / Explain / node synthesis).

llmModel.title: LLM model
llmModel.description: Model ID sent to the LLM provider. Leave blank to use the provider's default model.

llmApiKey.title: LLM API key
llmApiKey.description: Bring-your-own-key API key for the selected provider. Warning: this value is stored in plain text in your Jupyter user settings directory — do not use on shared machines. Leave blank to let the engine fall back to its own environment key or the template backend.

engineUrlOverride.title: Engine URL override
engineUrlOverride.description: Full WebSocket URL of a NotebookFlow engine (e.g. ws://127.0.0.1:8765/ws). Leave blank to auto-resolve through jupyter-server-proxy.
